text.title: Agency Discovery Call Scorecard Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to apply Agency Discovery Call Scorecard end-to-end from inputs to a validated `rubric` artefact + human signoff.

step.name: gather-inputs
step.input: Brief + upstream artefacts named in AGENTS.md Prerequisites table
step.action: Extract all required inputs into a structured state dict. Confirm every `Applies If` item evaluates true.
step.output: State dict; preconditions report (each item: true/false/unknown)
step.decision-gate: If any `Applies If` item is false OR any `Skip If` item is true, return an action=skip envelope and STOP per rule `skip-this-methodology`.

step.name: apply-rules
step.action: Apply each rule from content/01-core-rules.xml. Walk the decision tree in content/06-decision-tree.xml. Record any deviation with a one-line rationale in the deviation log.

step.name: synthesise-output
step.input: State dict + rule trace + decision-tree leaf
step.action: Author the `rubric` artefact conforming to content/02-output-contract.xml. Use the matching template under templates/.
step.output: Draft artefact (JSON / Markdown / YAML per template)

step.name: validate-output
step.action: Run scripts/validate-agency-discovery-call-scorecard.py --file <artefact>. On exit 1, fix the violations and re-validate. On repeated failure, escalate.
step.decision-gate: If validation fails after 3 attempts, escalate to human; do NOT auto-publish.

step.name: human-checkpoint
step.action: Surface `ready_for_review=true`. Wait for named human reviewer signoff per rule `human-checkpoint`. Record signoff (reviewer + date) on the artefact.
step.output: Signed-off artefact at output location named in Prerequisites
